name: Westphalian Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
-------------
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Press cottage cheese through a sieve.
3. In large bowl, cream butter with sugar; do not beat.
4. Add egg yolks and vanilla; blend until mixture is light and fluffy.
5. Add cream cheese, cottage cheese, and cornstarch; blend well.
6. Beat egg whites until stiff peaks form.
7. Fold egg whites into cheese batter.
8. Pour mixture into prepared crust.
9. Bake for about 1 hour or until top is golden brown.
10. Allow cake to cool in oven for 2 hours before chilling.
